## Scope

Describe the defensive backend, security, test, documentation, or release-preparation work.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Uses synthetic/demo data only.
- [ ] Does not include real credentials, real tokens, API keys, secrets, customer data, or evidence files.
- [ ] Does not add offensive tooling, exploit code, live scanning, or malware behavior.
- [ ] Tests are added or updated where behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where relevant.
- [ ] Docs safety checks pass.

## Notes

Live GitHub Issues are not created yet. This template is prepared locally for the future publishing phase.
